name: boltz2_submit_prediction
description: Submit Boltz2 structure prediction job to Vertex AI. Supports proteins, RNA, DNA, and ligands. Accepts FASTA (auto-converted to BOLTZ2 YAML) or native BOLTZ2 YAML input.

input.description: Input sequence in FASTA format, BOLTZ2 YAML format, or path to input file. FASTA is automatically converted to BOLTZ2 YAML.

num_model_seeds.description: Number of model seeds for prediction diversity (default: 1). More seeds = more independent predictions.

num_diffusion_samples.description: Number of diffusion samples per seed (default: 5). More samples = more structural diversity per seed.

gpu_type.description: GPU type: 'auto' (default, A100 for <=2000 tokens, A100_80GB for >2000), 'A100', or 'A100_80GB'. No L4 support — BOLTZ2 requires minimum 40GB VRAM.

enable_flex_start.description: Enable DWS FLEX_START scheduling to queue job when GPUs unavailable (default: true)

name: boltz2_analyze_parallel
description: Trigger parallel analysis of Boltz2 predictions via Cloud Run Jobs. Generates pLDDT plots, PDE heatmaps, ipTM matrix, and Gemini expert analysis.

name: boltz2_get_analysis_results
description: Retrieve Boltz2 analysis results from Cloud Run. Returns ranking_score, pTM, ipTM, chain_pair_iptm, pLDDT, and Gemini expert analysis.

name: boltz2_open_viewer
description: Open the FoldRun 3D structure viewer for Boltz2 predictions. Shows CIF structure with pLDDT coloring, ranking scores, ipTM matrix, and analysis plots.
